---
id: list-signature-observers
title: "List observers of a signature request"
description: "Returns all observers that have been added to the signature request"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List observers of a signature request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/signature-requests/{SR_ID}/observers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all observers that have been added to the signature request
with the ID `SR_ID`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
